name: housekeep
description: Small Claude Code skills for keeping your dev workflow tidy

plugins.name: housekeep
plugins.description: Six housekeeping skills (todo, do, papercut, audit-permission-requests, setup-housekeep, shim) plus a prefer-dedicated-tools Bash hook and an audit-permission-requests log hook. setup-housekeep installs a read-only local-search MCP (ripgrep-backed Grep/Glob). shim installs PATH-based CLI shims that route safe subcommands directly and rebuff unsafe ones to a -real escape hatch — scoped to Claude sessions only via CLAUDE_CODE_EXECPATH. All idempotent.
